value.string:
input = WScript.Arguments(0)
'input = "\\ITCASRPACTR02\share\Retail_Transfer_Price_Change\robot2\Pricing\Gucci\Variazione TRF_RET\Input_RPA\retail_temp.xlsx;F4:G"
input_parts = Split(input, ";")
excel_path = input_parts(0)
range_cells = input_parts(1)
parts_range = Split(range_cells, ":")

Set obj = createobject("Excel.Application")
Set xlsx = obj.Workbooks.open(excel_path)
'Set xlsx = GetObject(, "Excel.Application")
'Set obj = xlsx.Application
obj.visible=False
obj.DisplayAlerts = False

n_rows = Cstr(xlsx.ActiveSheet.Cells.CurrentRegion.Rows.Count)
n_cols = Cstr(xlsx.ActiveSheet.Cells.CurrentRegion.Rows.Count)
first_num_ind_start = 0
do
    first_num_ind_start = first_num_ind_start+1
Loop until (first_num_ind_start>=len(parts_range(0)) or IsNumeric(Mid(parts_range(0),first_num_ind_start,1)))
first_num_ind_end = 0
do
    first_num_ind_end = first_num_ind_end+1
Loop until (first_num_ind_end>=len(parts_range(1)) or IsNumeric(Mid(parts_range(1),first_num_ind_end,1)))

'MsgBox(Cstr(first_num_ind_start)&" "&Cstr(first_num_ind_start))

start_col = Mid(parts_range(0), 1, first_num_ind_start-1)
end_col = Mid(parts_range(1), 1, first_num_ind_end-1)
start_row = Mid(parts_range(0), first_num_ind_start, (Len(parts_range(0))+1-first_num_ind_start))
end_row = Mid(parts_range(1), first_num_ind_end, (Len(parts_range(1))+1-first_num_ind_end))
if isNumeric(end_row)<>true then
  n_rows = Cstr(xlsx.ActiveSheet.Cells.CurrentRegion.Rows.Count)
  n_cols = Cstr(xlsx.ActiveSheet.Cells.CurrentRegion.Rows.Count)
  end_col = Mid(parts_range(1), 1, first_num_ind_end)
  end_row = n_rows
end if

range_columns=start_col&":"&end_col
'MsgBox(range_columns)
'MsgBox(start_col&start_row&":"&end_col&end_row)


Set rng =  xlsx.ActiveSheet.range(start_col&"1")
i = 0
Do
  range_columns_cells = start_col&start_row&":"&end_col&end_row
  curr_col = Split(rng.offset(0,i).Address, "$")(1)
  range_columns_cells = curr_col&start_row&":"&curr_col&end_row
  'MsgBox(range_columns_cells)
  set range = xlsx.ActiveSheet.Range(range_columns_cells)
  range.TextToColumns
  range.NumberFormat = "#,##0"
  i=i+1
  
Loop Until curr_col=end_col
xlsx.close True
'MsgBox("Done")

variables.name: prompt-assignment
variables.description: A variable you can use for assignments
